# jamfschool_clear_device_activation_lock (Action)

Clears the activation lock from a device.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Clear the activation lock from a device.
action "jamfschool_clear_device_activation_lock" "clear_lock" {
  config {
    serial_number = "C02ABC123DEF"
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `serial_number` (String) Device serial number. Provide this or `udid`.
- `udid` (String) Device UDID. Provide this or `serial_number`.
